operation.name: copyMem_at_psmgr_create
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun desc_access_size () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun desc_alloc_size () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  (concat  (select  desc_alloc_size (_ bv7 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_alloc_size (_ bv6 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_alloc_size (_ bv5 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_alloc_size (_ bv4 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_alloc_size (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_alloc_size (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_alloc_size (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_alloc_size (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) (concat  (select  desc_access_size (_ bv7 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_access_size (_ bv6 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_access_size (_ bv5 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_access_size (_ bv4 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_access_size (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_access_size (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_access_size (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_access_size (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

name: WMI-3: Attacker-Determined Content in an Authoritative Position @ psmgr_create

metadata.bug_type: WMI-3 Attacker-Determined Content in an Authoritative Position

oracle_spec.assertion: session holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content
assumptions: externally-originated content installed into the field

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
